message:
perf(dashboard): memoize context provider values to stop re-render cascade (#6161)

Fixes #6149 — a single dashboard-to-dashboard navigation was producing
461 React commits in the profiler (expected ~5). Root cause: several
top-level Context Providers were passing fresh object literals as the
`value=` prop on every render, forcing every consumer in the tree
(every SortableCard, every CardWrapper, layout chrome, etc.) to
re-render.

The smoking gun was AuthProvider. It ships two background intervals
(EXPIRY_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS at 60s and BACKEND_REVALIDATE_INTERVAL_MS at
30s, the latter added in #6094) which call setUser / setTokenState.
Each tick produced a brand-new `{ user, token, isAuthenticated, ... }`
object, cascading through MissionProvider → ToastProvider → the
dashboard → every card. Since the background /api/me revalidation
returns the same user object shape every time, none of those
re-renders produced any visible change.

Changes:

- lib/auth.tsx: wrap the provider value in useMemo; stabilize
  logout/login/setToken with useCallback. In refreshUser, skip calling
  setUser when the new payload is shallow-equal to the current user
  (background revalidation no-op). Clean up a stale
  eslint-disable-next-line directive and add `logout` to the expiry
  useEffect deps now that it has a stable identity.

- hooks/useDrillDown.tsx: wrap open/push/pop/goTo/close/replace in
  useCallback and memoize the provider value.

- components/ui/Toast.tsx: wrap showToast/removeToast in useCallback,
  memoize the provider value, promote the 3000 magic number to
  TOAST_AUTO_DISMISS_MS.

- lib/cardEvents.tsx: wrap publish/subscribe in useCallback and
  memoize the provider value.

- components/cards/CardWrapper.tsx: memoize CardExpandedContext and
  ForceLiveContext provider values (they were fresh inline objects on
  every card render, not global providers — smaller win but still
  measurable with dozens of cards on screen).

Verified:
- npm run build: clean
- npm run lint: no new errors/warnings in changed files
- vitest auth + Toast + DrillDown + Login + AuthCallback: 161/161 pass
- vitest card suite: 884/884 pass

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -852,10 +852,19 @@ export function CardWrapper({
   void title
   void setLocalMessages
 
+  // #6149 — Memoize inline provider values so every CardWrapper re-render
+  // (there are dozens on every dashboard) does not invalidate the
+  // CardExpandedContext / ForceLiveContext consumers inside the card.
+  const cardExpandedValue = useMemo(
+    () => ({ isExpanded, containerSize }),
+    [isExpanded, containerSize]
+  )
+  const forceLiveValue = useMemo(() => !!forceLive, [forceLive])
+
   return (
     <CardTypeContext.Provider value={cardType}>
-    <CardExpandedContext.Provider value={{ isExpanded, containerSize }}>
-      <ForceLiveContext.Provider value={!!forceLive}>
+    <CardExpandedContext.Provider value={cardExpandedValue}>
+      <ForceLiveContext.Provider value={forceLiveValue}>
       <CardDataReportContext.Provider value={reportCtx}>
         <>
           {/* Outer wrapper for demo corner brackets (outside card border) */}
